name: Patch Tower
explanation: A colossal three-oscillator semi-modular monophonic synthesizer in the great modular-tower lineage. Three big detuned oscillators (band-limited saw, pulse and triangle) blend thick, joined by a dedicated white-noise channel and hard oscillator SYNC for metallic sweeps. Everything pours into a fat 4-pole transistor-ladder low-pass with tanh saturation in its feedback loop and its own sweeping filter envelope, with last-note-priority glide. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Detune (3-osc spread), Sync, Noise, Glide and master Level. Regal, towering and modular.
